reasoning: Candidate (RIGHT): circular pixel-art summon VFX with a pink centre orb, white cloud-puff accents, and a dark forest-green wreath-like ring, all on a near-black background. The pink orb and white puffs are genuinely charming and whimsical — positive alignment with the fairy-tale / Nintendo-family target. However, the jet-black background and the cold, desaturated dark-green outer ring pull the overall read toward 'RPG dungeon magic circle' rather than 'warm sunny Hyrule echo'. The circular ritual-pattern framing is structurally occult-adjacent, which is a flagged out-of-tone category. Peer reference (LEFT) is unambiguously dungeon-crawler (stone tiles, blood stains, teal portals) — candidate is meaningfully warmer than the peer but has not fully cleared the warmth/brightness bar. Needs: brighter/warmer background (cream, gold, soft sky), warmer green tones (mint or lime rather than forest), and softer glow treatment to read as whimsical rather than ritual.
